_comment: PipeCrew plugin hooks. Auto-loaded by Claude Code when the plugin is installed. (1) PreToolUse/Bash installs the troubleshooter bash guard; it self-gates on ~/.claude/.pipecrew-troubleshooter-active and exits 0 immediately when no /troubleshoot run is active, so it has zero effect otherwise (see scripts/troubleshooter-bash-guard.js + skills/troubleshoot/SKILL.md). (2) Notification/UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse drive scripts/notify-hook.js, which writes/clears awaiting_claude_approval.json in every ACTIVE /deliver run dir so the site-view UI shows a banner when Claude Code itself (not a pipeline gate) is paused asking the user to approve a tool call. notify-hook self-gates on active run dirs (scratchpad mtime within a short window) — when no /deliver run is live it is a fast no-op, so registering it globally is safe (same pattern as the bash guard).
